channel.title: Posts on Art of Dmitry Brushray
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Art of Dmitry Brushray

item.title: Jan 26 Art mix by Dmitry Brushray
item.description:
Mix of my artworks around January 2026

Crawling Tech Priest Crawling Tech Priest, quick fan art

Servitor fan art Servitor with plasma and industrial claw, fan art

Skaven warriors, fan art Skaven warriors-warriors fighters-fighters, fan art

Herpetrax Chaos knight fan art Herpetrax Chaos knight - drop pod cleaning, fan art

item.title: Dec 25 Art mix by Dmitry Brushray
item.description:
Mix of my artworks around December 2025

Metal always endures I saw a kitbash or maybe it was somethin official where the head place of a knight was taken by huge two barrels gun. I love more palsma so it just came to me to make some sort of a stationary weapon from knight leftovers which main purpose is to carry titan class plasma as a stationary canon. So I decided to experiment with this, thought people would like something unusuall.

item.title: October 2025 Art mix by Dmitry Brushray
September art mix
item.description:
Mix of my recently published artworks.

AdMech vs some Heretics fan art

Hey everyone! What I love about AdMech is that if a hand or leg a bit longer than it should be, it’s not a problem it’s an AdMech thing, you know. So yeh, scale might be a little bit off. However I wanted to paint a titan and a dunecrawler in a single battle scene. I hope you like it.
